Name: REQ-001 Multi-tenant Isolation
description: The system shall enforce strict data isolation between tenant instances to prevent cross-tenant data access

Name: REQ-002 SSO Integration
description: The system shall support single sign-on via SAML 2.0 and OpenID Connect for enterprise customers

Name: REQ-003 Bulk Export
description: The system shall support export of up to 100,000 contact records in CSV and JSON formats

Name: REQ-004 EU Data Residency
description: The system shall store and process EU customer data exclusively within European data centers

Name: REQ-005 Mobile Offline Mode
description: The mobile application shall support offline access to recently viewed contacts and deals
